flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cecil College fell 64% between 2006 and 2009 (15.8% → 5.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cecil College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cecil College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.5k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cecil College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
